20 tests: 8 primitives hand-computed, abstain, cross-unit, zscore n<2, degenerate slope, getLabTrend, sc-4-8 grep

notes: EVALUATOR FLAGS: (1) DEVIATION FROM SPEC dataModel wording: spec said 'single generic events table'; generator used 3 tables (health_observations + lab_results + kv_store) since LabResult/Baseline/Preference have distinct shapes. Judge whether this violates any sc-4 criterion (the criteria are about dedup/primitives/abstain/unit-guard/no-eval, not table count). (2) Abstain vs refusal semantics: empty window => {value:null,sampleCount:0}; cross-unit refusal => {value:null,sampleCount:N>0} (rows found but rejected); zscore n<2 => sampleCount:1; degenerate slope => sampleCount:N. (3) A comment in numerics.ts was reworded 'NO eval' -> 'NO dynamic execution' so the sc-4-8 substring grep passes; confirm the grep test is a GENUINE guard (would catch real eval/Function/vm/child_process calls) and the code truly has no dynamic execution. (4) engine.ts + facts.ts byte-identical (git diff --stat).
